final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input d,
    input t,
    output reg q );  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (t) begin
            q <= ~q;
        end else begin
            q <= d;
        end
    end

endmodule
